name: Carrots
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Carrots, peeled and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the carrots thinly.
2. Melt the butter in a pan with the olive oil until hot.
3. Add the carrot slices to the pan and stir well.
4. Allow the carrots to stick slightly to the bottom of the pan and sauté until they are cooked through but still firm.
5. Stir in the chopped parsley, salt, and pepper.
6. Simmer until the desired doneness is reached.
